issues.title: chore: harden mono-template package layout for Vite + Beads integration
issues.body: Create and document the root package layout so the repository is consistently scaffolded as a multi-package template (`packages/*`, `apps/*`, workspace scripts, shared build baseline).

issues.title: feat: add repo-level CI workflow for workspace quality gates
issues.body: Add GitHub Actions workflow(s) that run `npm run ci`, optional `npm run ci:nightly`, and Beads sync/verification checks for every workspace.

issues.title: feat: add agent swarm bootstrapping scripts and runbook
issues.body: Ship `npm run agent:*` utilities to create seed issues, print repo context, hand off claims, and spawn a ready team of working agents.

issues.title: feat: implement scaffold/agent command for create-vibets workflow
issues.body: Improve `create-vibets` entry point to orchestrate the new agent bootstrap flow with safe defaults and optional direct assignment behavior.

issues.title: chore: codify noslop + agent-docs policy for autonomous agent workflows
issues.body: Audit and document which agent hooks are intentionally enforced and where agent workflows can remain fast while preserving quality expectations.

issues.title: chore: publish memory-aware agent handoff guidance and run checklist
issues.body: Add docs/checklists that include memory handoff format, issue-specific context capture, and completion criteria for multi-agent work.
